task_description: Add DynamoDB table (SleepAudioMetadataTable) for storing audio pipeline metadata and extend the Step Functions state machine with basic input/output handling (PutItem on start, UpdateItem on completion/failure). Follow strict TDD: tests first, then implementation, then ARCHITECTURE.md update.

verification.summary: All 17 tests pass including 5 new DynamoDB/error-handling tests. cdk synth succeeds. Tests verify actual resource properties (table key schema, billing mode, SSE, PITR), state machine definition content (dynamodb:putItem, dynamodb:updateItem, Catch), and IAM policy statements - all would fail if implementation were reverted.
